title: This is another notification test!
body:
Due to some issues in the Alpha 26, this hopefully works now in the newly released Alpha 27.

meow :3

title: Hello!
body:
# Hi there!

I hope you're having a fantastic day!

First of all, thank you so much for testing the Alpha of Kodama. **I'm so excited!**
This heat over here is dreadful, but **thank GOD** it's getting more bearable soon.

A few wonderful people on the [Better Lyrics Discord-Sever](https://discord.gg/UsHE3d5fWF) already gave some valuable feedback, as well as some close friends, so I hope everything is going to be fixed and get working.

Here a little teaser of what to expect in the new update:
- New Share option
- Crossfade finally working
- Custom Crossfade duration between specific songs
- Custom App Icons
- Improved Visualizer-Settings
- Quicker song load times, especially with slower connections
- Overall UI optimizations

This update should drop later today. So be prepared!

If you spot any issues, bugs or just have a suggestion in mind, don't hesitate to just the built in Report Tool.

Again, thank you so much! Without, this wouldn't be possible in the long run.

Love y'all! 🩷
